scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:fresh: npm run build:local && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run tsc
scripts.lint: npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:app
scripts.tsc: npm run tsc:shared && npm run tsc:backend && npm run tsc:frontend && npm run tsc:app
scripts.install-all: npm ci && npm --prefix shared ci && npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix app ci && bash ./copy-backend-files.sh && npm --prefix dist ci
scripts.build:local: npm --prefix backend run build && npm run build:lightroom && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix dist ci
scripts.gql: graphql-codegen --config codegen.ts && prettier --write shared/urql/graphql.schema.json frontend/src/fonts.generated.ts app/src/fonts.generated.ts app/src/graphql.schema.json
scripts.release:app:install: npm --prefix shared ci && npm --prefix app ci --ignore-scripts
scripts.release:app:lint: npm --prefix shared run lint && npm --prefix app run lint
scripts.release:app:tsc: npm run tsc:shared && npm run tsc:app
scripts.release:app:doctor: cd app && (npx expo-doctor || echo '[release:app:doctor] expo-doctor reported issues (advisory, non-blocking)')
scripts.release:app:export:android: cd app && npx expo export --platform android
scripts.release:app:preflight: npm run release:app:auth && npm run release:app:install && npm run release:app:lint && npm run release:app:tsc && npm run release:app:doctor && npm run release:app:export:ios
scripts.release:app:eas:ios: cd app && npx eas build --platform ios --profile production --auto-submit --non-interactive --wait
scripts.release:app:eas:android: cd app && npx eas build --platform android --profile production --auto-submit --non-interactive --wait
scripts.release:app:eas: npm run release:app:eas:ios && npm run release:app:eas:android
scripts.release:app:ios: npm run release:app:preflight && npm run release:app:version && npm run release:app:eas:ios
scripts.release:app:android: npm run release:app:preflight && npm run release:app:version && npm run release:app:eas:android
scripts.release:app: npm run release:app:preflight && npm run release:app:version && npm run release:app:eas
